messages.content: Hey, thanks for getting back to me. I have actually already reached out a while ago via email and haven't gotten a response, so I thought I'd try here. Would someone be able to put a word in for me that we are keen and have reached out?

Hey legend. Our band Booker is justan and his email is:
OakBandBooking@gmail.com
Let me know if there are any available dates in December or early 2026

Hi, my name is Elijah. And I'm part of a 4-piece alternative rock band called Industry Plant, we're all 18 and over and would be super keen to play a gig at the Oak! We play high energy original music and would be a great fit for your venue!
